about.bio: I'm Hongying, an indie developer based in Jinan. I'm passionate about turning AI capabilities into products that genuinely work—from image generation and long-form writing to self-hosted MCP toolchains. TypeScript/Vue on the frontend, Java on the backend, Python as glue.
